_comment: Fiesta headless game-client configuration. Loaded by SVC_FIESTA via ElleConfig dot-path keys (fiesta.host, fiesta.port, ...). Drop this file into Deploy/Configs/ alongside the other service configs and the master ElleAnn config will merge it. Sensitive credentials should NOT be committed; populate username/password in your local copy only.

fiesta._topology_note: ShineEngine Mischief 6.11.2015 build, ports per JHR_ServerInfo.txt. Client speaks to 3 TCP servers in sequence: PG_Login (9010, auth) → PG_WorldManager (9110, char list, zone select) → PG_Zone_00 (9120, gameplay). All run on 127.0.0.1 in this build. Cipher seed (NC_MISC_SEED_ACK) is renewed at each hand-off. Initial connect target = PG_Login.
fiesta._user_no_note: Optional. When > 0, SVC_FIESTA persists GameSessionState rows keyed on this nUserNo (matches the game's tUser.nUserNo). Set this to the same nUserNo Elle.Service.HTTP linked the device to during /api/auth/pair, and ElleCore.dbo.GameSessionState becomes a survives-restart record of where Elle was in the game world.
fiesta._protocol_version_note: NC_MAP_LOGIN_REQ carries a u32 protocol-version. Mischief 6.11.2015 expects 0; bump only if a newer client capture shows otherwise. The 'NO-APEX VERSION' WM log is an internal guild-data load failure on the SERVER side, NOT a client-rejection — ignore.
